series_names: VACON® NXA Liquid Cooled active front-end
VACON® NXB Liquid Cooled external brake chopper
knowledge_base_metadata.knowledge_base_scope: VACON® NXP family typecode parsing and nominal technical data extraction for liquid-cooled NXP/NXA/NXB products using the uploaded Selection Guide and VACON® NXS/NXP Operating Guide.
knowledge_base_metadata.coverage_summary: Includes liquid-cooled typecode key, nominal current-based code decoding, mains-voltage codes, keypad codes, enclosure codes, EMC codes, brake-chopper codes, hardware-modification codes, option-board slot structure, chassis/dimension mappings, enclosure-size mappings from the operating guide, and rating tables for 400-500 VAC, 525-690 VAC, 465-800 VDC inverter units, and 640-1100 VDC wide-voltage inverter units.
unresolved_global_gaps: The uploaded Selection Guide does not provide a complete exhaustive list of optional + codes after the base liquid-cooled typecode; it only shows examples such as +HXC1 and refers generally to option content.
The uploaded documents do not provide acoustic noise values as a complete per-rating table.

The uploaded documents do not provide per-rating efficiency values as a table; one rating note states values are calculated with cosφ = 0,83 and efficiency = 97% in the 400-500 VAC liquid-cooled ratings table context.
The uploaded documents do not present one single fixed-length universal typecode for all NXP variants; base code length varies by family/configuration and optional suffixes extend the code.
conflicts_detected: The selection guide liquid-cooled typecode key uses liquid-cooled segment definitions, while the operating guide typecode description is for NXS/NXP air-cooled wall-mounted and standalone products. Overlap is used where directly compatible, and differences are recorded explicitly in conflicts.

source_registry.short_title: VACON® NXP Liquid Cooled Selection Guide
source_registry.scope_summary: Liquid-cooled NXP/NXA/NXB family overview, technical data, typecode key, ratings, chassis and dimensions, and enclosed-drive data.
notes_relevant_to_decoding_or_datasheet_: Page 22 contains the liquid-cooled typecode key with base segment order and value meanings.
Pages 14-17 contain rating tables with nominal-current-coded type examples and chassis mapping.
Page 21 contains general technical data including input voltage ranges and cooling-agent information.

source_registry.short_title: VACON® NXS/NXP Air-cooled Wall-mounted and Standalone Operating Guide
source_registry.scope_summary: General NXS/NXP typecode structure reference, enclosure-size mapping, protection ratings, EMC classes, and dimensional/cooling-related framework data.
source_registry.explicit_power_range_covered: NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS
notes_relevant_to_decoding_or_datasheet_: Pages 20-22 define general NXP typecode segments including keypad, protection rating, EMC class, brake chopper, hardware changes, option-board slots, and optional documentation codes.
Pages 23-25 map nominal current and mains-voltage code combinations to enclosure sizes FR4-FR11.
Pages 25-27 define available protection ratings and EMC-class meanings.
Pages 39-41 provide clearance/cooling tables rather than nominal electrical rating tables.

typecode_structure.explanation: Product family prefix in the liquid-cooled typecode key.
Four-digit nominal-current code, for example 0007 = 7 A, 0022 = 22 A, 0205 = 205 A.
Nominal mains-voltage code in the liquid-cooled key.
Liquid-cooled key gives enclosure-class code 0 = IP00 and 5 = IP54.
EMC-emission level code in the liquid-cooled key.
Brake chopper presence code. Integrated brake chopper availability is conditional by chassis/family.
Supply/front-end topology code such as inverter unit, active front-end unit, standard 6-pulse, 12-pulse, or low harmonic.
Cooling/material code for liquid-cooled module construction.

A2 Option boards; each slot is represented by two characters
00 Option boards; each slot is represented by two characters
typecode_structure.explanation: Third option-board slot code pair; 00 means slot not used.

typecode_structure.segment_label_from_manual: 00 Option boards; each slot is represented by two characters
typecode_structure.explanation: Fourth option-board slot code pair; 00 means slot not used.

typecode_structure.segment_label_from_manual: C3 Option boards; each slot is represented by two characters

typecode_structure.explanation: Family suffix shown in the liquid-cooled typecode key example.
Optional suffix codes appended after the base liquid-cooled family suffix. The uploaded documents do not provide the exhaustive optional-code catalog.

mapping_rules.mapping_logic_from_documents: Map code 5 to 380-500 VAC and code 6 to 525-690 VAC.
Use nominal_current_code to lookup Output_current in technical_tables electrical tables.
Determine chassis from rating table using nominal_current_code, then map chassis to dimensions using dimension table.
Map enclosure_class_code 0 to IP00 and 5 to IP54.
Map EMC code to emission category using table definitions.

constraints.exact_rule: Brake chopper code 1 only available for CH3, CH72 (6-pulse) and CH74.
Codes F and G for board modifications only valid for FR9 to FR11.
Each option slot must be represented by two characters; 00 means slot unused.

family_detection_rules: If typecode starts with NXP, NXA, or NXB classify as VACON NXP family
fallback_rules: If value not found return NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS
app_resolution_model.unavailable_value_marker: NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS
